title: Resolves source link candidates to navigation decisions based on linked snippets
purpose: Determines the appropriate navigation action when resolving a symbol's definition by evaluating source-link candidates against currently linked snippets in the session.
module_context: Exports types for navigation decisions including found-linked, needs-link, needs-link-picker, and not-found. Defines the resolveDefinition function that implements the core navigation logic.

steps.content: Check if there are no candidates and return not-found if true.
Build a mapping from file paths to snippet IDs for fast lookup of linked snippets.
If there is exactly one candidate, check if it is linked and return found-linked or needs-link accordingly.
If there are multiple candidates, determine if they all point to the same source path.
IF all candidates point to the same path and that path is linked, return found-linked with the first matching candidate.
ELSE if all candidates point to the same path but it is not linked, return needs-link with the first candidate.
IF candidates point to different paths, return needs-link-picker with all candidates.
